opts: . is an approach to software development that relies on the reuse of entities called ‘software components.

What is Quality of Service?
opts: should include mechanisms for discovering if a component of the system has failed.
it is inevitable that failures will occur, so the system has to be designed to be resilient to these failures.

a: offered by a distributed system reflects the system’s ability to deliver its services dependably and with a response time and throughput that is acceptable to its users.
